if.test: (request.transactionTypes != null and request.transactionTypes.size() > 0) or request.minDealAmount != null or request.maxDealAmount != null or request.minAreaM2 != null or request.maxAreaM2 != null or request.dealYearFrom != null or request.dealYearTo != null

sql.if:
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id
)

mapper.sql:
p.property_id, p.property_type, p.name, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.road_address, ''), NULLIF(p.jibun_address, ''), CONCAT_WS(' ', p.sido, p.sigungu, p.legal_dong)) AS address, p.legal_dong, p.latitude, p.longitude, ( SELECT t.transaction_type FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id
ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_transaction_type, ( SELECT COALESCE(t.deal_amount_krw, t.deposit_amount_krw) FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id
ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_amount, ( SELECT t.deal_date FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id
ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_date, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id
) AS deal_count
mapper.select:
SELECT , NULL AS distance_m FROM properties p
ORDER BY latest_deal_date DESC, p.property_id DESC

SELECT ,
CAST(ROUND(ST_Distance_Sphere(POINT(p.longitude, p.latitude), POINT(#{request.centerLng}, #{request.centerLat}))) AS SIGNED)
NULL
AS distance_m FROM properties p
ORDER BY distance_m ASC, latest_deal_date DESC, p.property_id DESC
ORDER BY latest_deal_amount DESC, latest_deal_date DESC, p.property_id DESC
ORDER BY deal_count DESC, latest_deal_date DESC, p.property_id DESC
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN p.name = #{request.complexName} THEN 3 WHEN p.name LIKE CONCAT(#{request.complexName}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 1 END
CASE WHEN p.name LIKE CONCAT(#{request.keyword}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR p.road_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR p.jibun_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR p.legal_dong LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
0
DESC, latest_deal_date DESC, p.property_id DESC
ORDER BY latest_deal_date DESC, p.property_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.property_id, p.property_type, p.name, p.sido, p.sigungu, p.legal_dong, p.road_address, p.jibun_address, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.built_year, p.household_count, ( SELECT COALESCE(t.deal_amount_krw, t.deposit_amount_krw) FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_amount, ( SELECT t.deal_date FROM property_transactions t WHERE t.property_id = p.property_id ORDER BY t.deal_date DESC, t.transaction_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_deal_date FROM properties p WHERE p.property_id = #{propertyId}

SELECT transaction_id, transaction_type, exclusive_area_m2, floor, deal_amount_krw AS deal_amount, deposit_amount_krw AS deposit_amount, monthly_rent_krw AS monthly_rent, deal_date FROM property_transactions WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} ORDER BY deal_date DESC, transaction_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
